subject: Fix transfer pricing assessment for BOO variant
body:
- Skip full transfer pricing assessment for BOO (Build-Operate-Own)
  variant since no ownership transfer occurs
- Return a simplified service fee analysis object for BOO cases
- Update UI to handle notApplicable transfer pricing gracefully,
  showing informational message with service fee analysis only
- Update documentation in CALCULATIONS.md and model_4 concept doc
  to clarify BOO transfer pricing behavior
title: Fix transfer pricing assessment for BOO variant
